description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a tall, rectangular unit with a slightly angled front face, featuring a prominent display area and a control panel below. The marquee at the top reads 'Chica's Bakery' in a playful font, and the screen displays colorful cartoon graphics, including a yellow character holding a cupcake and another figure at a table. The control panel is magenta with several yellow buttons, and the lower front panel features a stylized image of a character's face. The side panels are dark with a single yellow cartoon face graphic, while the back is plain and unadorned. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and screen. The overall design is vibrant and themed, likely intended to attract attention in an arcade or entertainment venue.
description: A tall, themed arcade game cabinet with 'Chica's Bakery' marquee, cartoon graphics, and a magenta control panel with yellow buttons. The sides feature a single yellow face graphic, and the cabinet is mostly dark in color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Chica's Bakery' marquee, screen with cartoon graphics, magenta control panel with yellow buttons, and a character face on the lower panel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the dark side panel with a single yellow cartoon face graphic and the angled profile of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a yellow cartoon face graphic and the cabinet's angled profile.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with several yellow buttons arranged in a cluster; no joystick or other controls are clearly visible.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Chica's Bakery' in a playful font with a yellow color on a dark background, matching the bakery and cartoon theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Each side panel features a single yellow cartoon face graphic; otherwise, the panels are plain and dark.
